title: SOC Operations — Threat Overview
description: Three-tab SOC dashboard: Overview (hero KPIs + geo + severity over time), Innsikt (threat intelligence — top attackers, MITRE techniques, kill-chain, attack patterns), Analytiker (master-detail investigation with drilldown-driven context panels). Demonstrates every interactivity skill in this plugin: tabs, tokens, inputs (incl. multiselect with |s), defaults.tokens.default initialisation, drilldowns (setToken + linkToDashboard), visibility (containerOptions.visibility with showConditions), and the SOC archetype from ds-design-principles.

ds_kpi_critical.name: critical alerts count synth - severity rotates so SOC tile flips RAG live

options.query: | makeresults | eval count=case(random()%4=0, 23, random()%4=1, 8, random()%4=2, 47, 1=1, 12) | table count

ds_geo_attacks.name: geographic attack source - country counts using bundled geom geo_countries lookup

options.query: | makeresults count=12 | streamstats count as i | eval country=case(i==1,"China",i==2,"Russia",i==3,"United States",i==4,"North Korea",i==5,"Iran",i==6,"Brazil",i==7,"India",i==8,"Vietnam",i==9,"Romania",i==10,"Ukraine",i==11,"Germany",i==12,"United Kingdom"), attacks=case(i==1,4820,i==2,3140,i==3,2105,i==4,1890,i==5,1432,i==6,890,i==7,720,i==8,615,i==9,540,i==10,470,i==11,210,i==12,180) | geom geo_countries featureIdField=country | fields country attacks geom

ds_severity_over_time.name: severity counts over time stacked column - 24 hourly buckets x 4 severities

options.query: | makeresults count=24 | streamstats count as h | eval _time=relative_time(now(), "-".(24-h)."h@h"), critical=case(h<8,random()%5+1,h>=8 AND h<16,random()%8+3,1=1,random()%12+5), high=random()%18+8, medium=random()%35+15, low=random()%55+30 | table _time critical high medium low

ds_recent_alerts.name: recent alerts table for overview drilldown - 8 rows with severity host action

options.query: | makeresults count=8 | streamstats count as i | eval _time=relative_time(now(), "-".(i*8)."m"), alert_id="ALT-".tostring(2400+i*7), severity=case(i==1,"critical",i==2,"critical",i==3,"high",i==4,"medium",i==5,"high",i==6,"low",i==7,"critical",i==8,"medium"), host=case(i==1,"web-01",i==2,"db-prod-03",i==3,"app-04",i==4,"web-02",i==5,"db-prod-01",i==6,"cache-02",i==7,"web-01",i==8,"queue-05"), src_ip=case(i==1,"203.0.113.42",i==2,"198.51.100.8",i==3,"203.0.113.99",i==4,"192.0.2.115",i==5,"198.51.100.8",i==6,"192.0.2.7",i==7,"203.0.113.42",i==8,"198.51.100.220"), rule=case(i==1,"Lateral movement detected",i==2,"SQL injection attempt",i==3,"Brute force - 200+ attempts",i==4,"Suspicious DNS query",i==5,"Privilege escalation",i==6,"Cache poisoning",i==7,"Lateral movement detected",i==8,"Anomalous queue access") | eval _time=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table _time alert_id severity host src_ip rule

ds_top_attackers.name: top attacker IPs sorted descending - bar chart for innsikt tab

ds_mitre_techniques.name: MITRE technique x tactic frequency for punchcard - heatmap density

options.query: | makeresults count=42 | streamstats count as i | eval tactic=case(i%7==0,"Initial Access",i%7==1,"Execution",i%7==2,"Persistence",i%7==3,"Privilege Escalation",i%7==4,"Defense Evasion",i%7==5,"Credential Access",i%7==6,"Lateral Movement"), technique=case(i%6==0,"Phishing",i%6==1,"PowerShell",i%6==2,"Scheduled Task",i%6==3,"Token Manipulation",i%6==4,"Obfuscated Files",i%6==5,"Brute Force"), count=random()%30+1 | stats sum(count) as count by tactic technique

ds_kill_chain.name: kill chain progression sankey - source stage to target stage with volume

options.query: | makeresults count=14 | streamstats count as i | eval source=case(i==1,"Recon",i==2,"Recon",i==3,"Initial Access",i==4,"Initial Access",i==5,"Execution",i==6,"Execution",i==7,"Persistence",i==8,"Persistence",i==9,"Lateral Movement",i==10,"Lateral Movement",i==11,"Lateral Movement",i==12,"Exfiltration",i==13,"Exfiltration",i==14,"Impact"), target=case(i==1,"Initial Access",i==2,"Execution",i==3,"Execution",i==4,"Persistence",i==5,"Persistence",i==6,"Privilege Esc",i==7,"Privilege Esc",i==8,"Lateral Movement",i==9,"Credential Access",i==10,"Exfiltration",i==11,"Impact",i==12,"Impact",i==13,"Blocked",i==14,"Blocked"), value=case(i==1,840,i==2,420,i==3,380,i==4,310,i==5,180,i==6,150,i==7,120,i==8,200,i==9,90,i==10,75,i==11,40,i==12,55,i==13,80,i==14,120) | table source target value

ds_hourly_pattern.name: attacks by day-of-week and hour-of-day for punchcard heatmap

options.query: | makeresults count=168 | streamstats count as i | eval dow=case((i-1)/24<1,"Mon",(i-1)/24<2,"Tue",(i-1)/24<3,"Wed",(i-1)/24<4,"Thu",(i-1)/24<5,"Fri",(i-1)/24<6,"Sat",1=1,"Sun"), hour=(i-1)%24, base=case(hour>=2 AND hour<=5, 80, hour>=9 AND hour<=17, 25, hour>=22 OR hour<=1, 60, 1=1, 18), count=base+(random()%20) | stats sum(count) as count by dow hour

ds_top_countries.name: top attacking countries bar chart - sorted descending

options.query: | makeresults count=10 | streamstats count as i | eval country=case(i==1,"China",i==2,"Russia",i==3,"North Korea",i==4,"Iran",i==5,"Vietnam",i==6,"Romania",i==7,"Brazil",i==8,"Ukraine",i==9,"India",i==10,"Other"), attacks=case(i==1,4820,i==2,3140,i==3,1890,i==4,1432,i==5,615,i==6,540,i==7,890,i==8,470,i==9,720,i==10,1245) | sort - attacks | table country attacks

ds_alert_table_full.name: full alert table for analytiker tab - master view rows clickable to populate detail panels

options.query: | makeresults count=15 | streamstats count as i | eval _time=relative_time(now(), "-".(i*7)."m"), alert_id="ALT-".tostring(2400+i*7), severity=case(i%4==0,"critical",i%4==1,"high",i%4==2,"medium",i%4==3,"low"), host=case(i%5==0,"web-01",i%5==1,"db-prod-03",i%5==2,"app-04",i%5==3,"web-02",i%5==4,"cache-02"), src_ip=case(i%6==0,"203.0.113.42",i%6==1,"198.51.100.8",i%6==2,"203.0.113.99",i%6==3,"192.0.2.115",i%6==4,"198.51.100.220",i%6==5,"203.0.113.7"), rule=case(i%5==0,"Lateral movement detected",i%5==1,"SQL injection attempt",i%5==2,"Brute force - 200+ attempts",i%5==3,"Suspicious DNS query",i%5==4,"Privilege escalation"), status=case(i%3==0,"Open",i%3==1,"Investigating",i%3==2,"Acknowledged") | eval _time=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table _time alert_id severity host src_ip rule status

ds_alert_detail.name: selected alert detail rows - host facts events count time of first/last seen

options.query: | makeresults | eval alert_id="$selected_alert_id$", host="$selected_host$", events_in_24h=843, first_seen="-22h", last_seen="-12m", related_alerts=7 | table alert_id host events_in_24h first_seen last_seen related_alerts

ds_host_timeline.name: events for selected host - time series line for analytiker context

options.query: | makeresults count=48 | streamstats count as h | eval _time=relative_time(now(), "-".(48-h)/2."h@30m"), events=case("$selected_host$"="",0,1=1,(random()%60)+30+if(h%6=0,80,0)) | table _time events

options.markdown:
# SOC Operations — Threat Overview

**Last 24h** · time-window driven by global filter above

Key signals at a glance. Drill into the **Innsikt** tab for threat-intel breakdowns, or the **Analytiker** tab for case-level investigation.

viz_kpi_critical.title: CRITICAL alerts
viz_kpi_critical.description: Hero KPI - up-is-bad polarity. Threshold-coloured: ≥20 critical = red (page on-call), 5-19 = orange, <5 = green.

viz_kpi_medium.title: MEDIUM alerts
viz_kpi_medium.description: Volume metric — informational. Static neutral color.

viz_kpi_open_cases.title: OPEN cases
viz_kpi_open_cases.description: Cases currently under SOC investigation. Down-is-bad - rising values mean backlog.

viz_geo_attacks.title: Attack sources — global
viz_geo_attacks.description: Choropleth layer over geom geo_countries. Hover any country to see attack count. SPL pre-resolves country names to full English (geo_countries doesn't accept ISO-2).

viz_severity_stacked.title: Alerts by severity over time
viz_severity_stacked.description: Stacked column - 24 hourly buckets, 4 severity series. Color order matches the SOC palette: red/orange/yellow/green for critical/high/medium/low.

viz_recent_alerts_overview.title: Recent alerts (8 most recent)
viz_recent_alerts_overview.description: Click any row to open the alert in the Analytiker tab. Severity column is colour-coded via matchValue to the SOC palette.

options.markdown:
# Threat Innsikt

Who is attacking, how, and when. Use the filters above to narrow scope. The MITRE matrix and kill-chain views are read top-down.

viz_top_attackers.title: Top 10 attacker IPs
viz_top_attackers.description: Horizontal bar, sorted descending. Source IPs with country code suffix. Click any bar to filter the rest of the page by that IP (drilldown.setToken).

viz_top_countries.title: Top attacking countries
viz_top_countries.description: Top-N + Other. Aggregating beyond top 9 prevents long tail clutter.

viz_mitre_punchcard.title: MITRE ATT&CK — technique × tactic frequency
viz_mitre_punchcard.description: Punchcard heatmap of technique frequency by tactic. Bubble size encodes count. Use to spot which tactic phase is currently most active.

viz_kill_chain.title: Kill chain progression
viz_kill_chain.description: Sankey of source-stage → target-stage transitions, weighted by event volume. The 'Blocked' sink is the SOC's defensive-control surface — fatter ribbons into Blocked = better.

viz_hourly_pattern.title: Attack pattern — day-of-week × hour-of-day
viz_hourly_pattern.description: Punchcard of attack volume by weekday and hour. Larger bubbles indicate sustained pressure. Use to identify off-hours patterns (weekend / 02-05 UTC).

options.markdown:
# Analytiker Investigation

Master-detail workflow: click a row in the **alert queue** below, and the right side populates with host context, event timeline, and case status. Selected alert: `$selected_alert_id$`  ·  host: `$selected_host$`  ·  severity: `$selected_severity$`

viz_alert_queue.title: Alert queue (15 rows)
viz_alert_queue.description: Master view. Click a row → setToken populates `selected_alert_id`, `selected_host`, `selected_severity`. Right-side detail panels then render via containerOptions.visibility.showConditions.

viz_detail_empty_hint.title: No alert selected
viz_detail_empty_hint.description: Visible only when no row has been clicked yet (containerOptions.visibility.showConditions: condition_no_alert).

options.markdown:
## ← Select an alert

Click any row in the alert queue on the left. The detail panels here will populate with:

- **Host facts** — events / 24h, first/last seen, related alerts
- **Host activity timeline** — event volume on the affected host
- **Investigation context** — alert metadata for the selected case

_(This empty-state hint disappears the moment you click a row — visibility is wired via `condition_no_alert: "$selected_alert_id$ = \"\""`.)_

viz_detail_summary.title: Investigation context
viz_detail_summary.description: Visible when an alert is selected. Pulls the selected alert id, host, and severity directly from tokens via markdown interpolation.

options.markdown:
## Selected case

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
_(Note: GFM tables aren't rendered by Studio markdown; using bullet list:)_

- **Alert ID:** `$selected_alert_id$`
- **Affected host:** `$selected_host$`
- **Severity:** `$selected_severity$`
- **Status:** Open · awaiting triage

**Recommended actions:**

1. Verify rule fired correctly (check `$selected_alert_id$` in raw events)
2. Confirm `$selected_host$` is in scope (asset inventory)
3. Check related alerts on the same host in the past 24h
4. Decide: escalate / dismiss / acknowledge

viz_detail_facts.title: Events on selected host (24h)
viz_detail_facts.description: Visible when alert is selected. Major value is the events_in_24h count for the host carrying the alert.

viz_detail_related.title: Related alerts (same host, 24h)
viz_detail_related.description: Count of correlated alerts. Up-is-bad — high values suggest pattern of compromise.

viz_host_timeline.title: Host activity — last 24h
viz_host_timeline.description: Event volume on `$selected_host$`. Spikes correlate with the alert's first-seen timestamp. Click + drag to set a finer time window.
